nodes.name: 角蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 角蜂鸟（Horned sungem，学名 Heliactin bilophus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联15个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
nodes.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联61种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、黑脸琵鹭、Malayan crested fireback等61种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿馬帕州
nodes.summary: 阿馬帕州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括白尾金喉蜂鸟、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、暗色髭喉蜂鸟等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 亚马孙州 (巴西)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The horned sungem (Heliactin bilophus) is a species of hummingbird native to much of central Brazil and parts of Bolivia and Suriname

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Female in Paraíba|alt=Female perching on a twig, in front-side view, partially hidden behind another twig The horned sungem is found across much of central Brazil, in the east from southern Maranhão south to the north of the State of São Paulo and then west to western Mato Grosso and into Bolivia's Santa Cruz department. It has recently expanded its range into southern Amazonas and Espírito Santo, probably as a result of deforestation and its ability to adopt open landscapes created by humans. It is also found in a small area of southern Suriname and in another small area in the northern Brazilian state of Amapá, and has been reported outside of its normal range in Acre in far western Brazil. A possible presence in the state of Rio de Janeiro has still to be confirmed. Its total range is estimated to encompass . The International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) considers the species to be uncommon, though some other sources have described it as "locally common" or "common". It inhabits a variety of semi-open to open habitats including dry and moist forests, savannas including the Cerrado and Caatinga, grasslands, and cultivated areas such as gardens. Though it is mostly found below of elevation, it occurs as high as
